layers.name: Technical Plan (plan.md)
evidence: 4 core tables: grocery_lists, grocery_list_items, user_pantry_items, grocery_product_map

layers.name: Code-Level Traceability
evidence: No Drizzle schema, migrations, or NestJS modules found for this feature

layers.name: Cross-Cutting Consistency
evidence: All 5 dependency specs (001, 002, 003, 006, 010) exist on disk
SC-004, SC-008, SC-009 consistent across all layers

findings.title: Sharing narrative exists without explicit FR in spec.md
findings.evidence: product-spec/product-spec.md US-009 (Household List Sharing) and sharing wireframe are present, but no explicit FR covering sharing exists in spec.md.
findings.recommendation: Add FR-034 or defer sharing to post-MVP if not in scope.

findings.title: STORE_INTEGRATION_ENABLED feature flag referenced but not in env schema
findings.evidence: plan.md Section 8 references a feature flag for store adapters, but no env variable schema exists yet.
findings.recommendation: Add env validation (e.g., .env.example, Zod schema) before T-013 begins.

findings.title: Minor task ordering inconsistency in tasks.md
findings.evidence: T-039 and T-040 appear after T-045 in tasks.md body but are shown in the dependency diagram as parallel to T-025..T-028.
findings.recommendation: Re-order tasks.md body to match dependency diagram (T-039/T-040 before T-041). Cosmetic fix.

findings.title: Zero implementation code found for feature 007
findings.evidence: Full directory scan of packages/ returned no .ts/.tsx files containing grocery, pantry, culinary, aggregator, or GroceryListScreen.
findings.recommendation: Expected pre-handoff; no action needed until implement phase begins.

findings.title: Monorepo path drift: assumed API path does not exist
findings.evidence: research/codebase-analysis.md references packages/apps/commise/api/src/grocery-lists/, but packages/api/ is empty and no api/ subdir exists under packages/apps/commise/.
findings.recommendation: Clarify canonical API location (likely packages/services/ or a new package) before module scaffolding.

recommendations: Before implementation: Ensure 006-meal-planning grocery-list generation hook exists (T-006 depends on meal plan APIs).
Post-implementation re-scan: Re-run L5 and L6 after T-001..T-012 complete to validate code-to-tasks traceability.
Store adapter caution: Walmart API key and Instacart partner agreement are still external blockers. Keep store tasks mock-only until credentials available.
Monorepo path drift: Clarify whether packages/api/ or a new package is the canonical API location before module scaffolding.
